tools.name: who_am_i
tools.title: Who am I
tools.description: Return the Catchwords profile of the currently connected user: display name, UI/target languages, level goal, and total sticker count.

tools.name: list_my_stickers
tools.title: List my stickers
tools.description: List the caller's most recent Catchwords stickers (photo/text/voice catches) with the associated Mandarin word, reading, Japanese meaning, and capture time. Returns compact rows suitable for browsing the dex.

limit.description: Maximum number of stickers to return (1-50). Defaults to 20.

offset.description: Number of stickers to skip for pagination. Defaults to 0.

tools.name: search_my_dex
tools.title: Search my dex
tools.description: Search the caller's caught words by Mandarin headword, pinyin, or Japanese meaning substring. Returns at most 30 matches, newest first, with the same shape as list_my_stickers.

query.description: Substring to match against headword (Mandarin), pinyin, or Japanese meaning. Case-insensitive.

tools.name: get_sticker
tools.title: Get sticker details
tools.description: Return full details for one of the caller's stickers by id: word card (headword, reading, pinyin, meaning, example sentence, part of speech, level, category), caption, location, and capture metadata. Only works for stickers owned by the caller.

tools.name: list_due_reviews
tools.title: List due reviews
tools.description: List the caller's SRS reviews that are due now (due_at ≤ now). Each row includes the sticker id, the associated Mandarin word, reading, and Japanese meaning, and the current SRS interval and ease.

limit.description: Maximum number of due reviews to return (1-100). Defaults to 25.
